_comment: Auto-fire the master-orchestrator after every git commit. The hook detects a successful commit from Bash tool output and spawns the orchestrator with the new commit's SHA. Read-only review — the orchestrator reports findings but does NOT auto-modify code.

hooks._note: Detects the '[branchname abc1234] ...' line git commit prints on success. When matched, emits POST_COMMIT_DETECTED which the user sees and can then manually invoke master-orchestrator on the new commit. Full auto-invocation is intentionally NOT wired because each orchestrator pass spawns ~10 specialist agents which is expensive — the detection signal lets the user decide.
